revision.comment: punctuation should not be italicized: previous word is not
revision.text: {{#if:{{{noicon|}}}{{{no-icon|}}}||[[File:PD-icon.svg|12px|class=noviewer|link=|alt=Public Domain]]}} {{#if:{{{sentence|}}}{{{inline|}}}|One or more of the preceding sentences|This article}} incorporates text from {{#if:{{{pl|}}}{{{plural|}}}|these sources, which are|this source, which is}} in the [[public domain]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|: {{{1}}}|.}}{{main other|[[Category:Source attribution]]}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{#if:{{{noicon|}}}{{{no-icon|}}}||[[File:PD-icon.svg|12px|class=noviewer|link=|alt=Public Domain]]}} {{#if:{{{sentence|}}}{{{inline|}}}|One or more of the preceding sentences|This article}} incorporates text from {{#if:{{{pl|}}}{{{plural|}}}|these sources, which are|this source, which is}} in the [[:en:Public domain|Public domain]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|: {{{1}}}|.}}{{main other|[[Category:Source attribution]]}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#if:{{{noicon|}}}{{{no-icon|}}}||[[File:PD-icon.svg|12px|class=noviewer|link=|alt=Public Domain]]}} {{#if:{{{sentence|}}}{{{inline|}}}|One or more of the preceding sentences|This article}} incorporates text from {{#if:{{{pl|}}}{{{plural|}}}|these sources, which are|this source, which is}} in the [[:en:Public domain|Public domain]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|: {{{1}}}|.}}{{main other|[[Category:Source attribution]]}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
